main.c(3) Library Functions Manual main.c(3)

NAME

main.c - ascii-chat Discovery Mode Entry Point

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int discovery_main (void)
Run discovery mode main loop.

Detailed Description

ascii-chat Discovery Mode Entry Point

Discovery mode enables zero-configuration video chat where participants can dynamically become hosts based on NAT quality. This implements the "one command to start, one command to join" philosophy.

Discovery Flow

1.
Parse session string (word-word-word format)
2.
Query ACDS for session information
3.
Assess NAT quality (STUN test)
4.
Either: a. Connect to existing host as participant b. Become host if no host exists or better NAT quality
5.
Handle dynamic role changes during session

Implementation Architecture

Discovery mode uses lib/session APIs for media handling:

  • session_host_t: For rendering and broadcasting when elected host
  • session_participant_t: For capture and display when not host
  • discovery_session_t: For ACDS connection and host negotiation

No network protocol code duplication - all media handling via lib/session.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Version

1.0

Definition in file discovery/main.c.

Function Documentation

int discovery_main (void )

Run discovery mode main loop. Discovery mode entry point for unified binary.

Handles session discovery, host negotiation, and media flow.

Returns

0 on success, non-zero error code on failure

Definition at line 324 of file discovery/main.c.

324                          {
325   log_debug("discovery_main() starting");
326 
327   // Discovery-specific setup: initialize ACDS connection and session negotiation
328   // Note: Shared setup (keepawake, splash, terminal, capture, display, audio)
329   // is handled by session_client_like_run()
330 
331   // Get session string from options (command-line argument)
332   const char *session_string = GET_OPTION(session_string);
333   bool is_initiator = (session_string == NULL || session_string[0] == '\0');
334 
335   int port_int = GET_OPTION(port);
336 
337   log_debug("Discovery: is_initiator=%d, port=%d", is_initiator, port_int);
338 
339   // Validate mutually exclusive options: discovery_service_url vs discovery_port
340   const char *service_url = GET_OPTION(discovery_service_url);
341   if (service_url && service_url[0] != '\0') {
342     int discovery_port = GET_OPTION(discovery_port);
343     if (discovery_port != ACIP_DISCOVERY_DEFAULT_PORT) {
344       log_fatal("--discovery-service-url and --discovery-service-port are mutually exclusive");
345       return ERROR_USAGE;
346     }
347   }
348 
349   // Create discovery session configuration
350   discovery_config_t discovery_config = {
351       .acds_address = GET_OPTION(discovery_server),
352       .acds_port = (uint16_t)GET_OPTION(discovery_port),
353       .acds_url = service_url,
354       .session_string = is_initiator ? NULL : session_string,
355       .local_port = (uint16_t)port_int,
356       .on_state_change = on_discovery_state_change,
357       .on_session_ready = on_session_ready,
358       .on_error = on_discovery_error,
359       .callback_user_data = NULL,
360       .should_exit_callback = discovery_capture_should_exit_adapter,
361       .exit_callback_data = NULL,
362   };
363 
364   // Create discovery session (stored in global for discovery_run() to access)
365   g_discovery = discovery_session_create(&discovery_config);
366   if (!g_discovery) {
367     log_fatal("Failed to create discovery session");
368     return ERROR_MEMORY;
369   }
370 
371   // Start discovery session (connects to ACDS, creates/joins, initiates NAT negotiation)
372   log_debug("Discovery: starting discovery session");
373   asciichat_error_t result = discovery_session_start(g_discovery);
374   if (result != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
375     log_fatal("Failed to start discovery session: %d", result);
376     discovery_session_destroy(g_discovery);
377     g_discovery = NULL;
378     return result;
379   }
380 
381   // No network interrupt callback needed - discovery session handles its own shutdown
382   set_interrupt_callback(NULL);
383 
384   /* ========================================================================
385    * Configure and Run Shared Client-Like Session Framework
386    * ========================================================================
387    * session_client_like_run() handles all shared initialization:
388    * - Terminal output management
389    * - Keepawake system
390    * - Splash screen lifecycle
391    * - Media source selection
392    * - FPS probing
393    * - Audio initialization
394    * - Display context creation
395    * - Proper cleanup ordering
396    *
397    * Discovery mode provides:
398    * - discovery_run() callback: NAT negotiation, role determination, media handling
399    * - discovery_keyboard_handler: interactive controls for participant role
400    */
401 
402   session_client_like_config_t config = {
403       .run_fn = discovery_run,
404       .run_user_data = NULL,
405       .tcp_client = NULL,
406       .websocket_client = NULL,
407       .discovery = (void *)g_discovery, // Opaque pointer to discovery session
408       .custom_should_exit = NULL,
409       .exit_user_data = NULL,
410       .keyboard_handler = discovery_keyboard_handler,
411       .max_reconnect_attempts = 0, // Discovery doesn't retry - role is determined once
412       .should_reconnect_callback = NULL,
413       .reconnect_user_data = NULL,
414       .reconnect_delay_ms = 0,
415       .print_newline_on_tty_exit = false, // Server/participant manages cursor
416   };
417 
418   log_debug("Discovery: calling session_client_like_run()");
419   asciichat_error_t session_result = session_client_like_run(&config);
420   log_debug("Discovery: session_client_like_run() returned %d", session_result);
421 
422   // Cleanup discovery session
423   log_debug("Discovery: cleaning up");
424 
425   if (g_discovery) {
426     discovery_session_stop(g_discovery);
427     discovery_session_destroy(g_discovery);
428     g_discovery = NULL;
429   }
430 
431   return (session_result == ASCIICHAT_OK) ? 0 : (int)session_result;
432 }




References ACIP_DISCOVERY_DEFAULT_PORT,
    ASCIICHAT_OK, discovery_session_create(),
    discovery_session_destroy(), discovery_session_start(),
    discovery_session_stop(), ERROR_MEMORY, ERROR_USAGE,
    GET_OPTION, log_debug, log_fatal,
    session_client_like_run(), and set_interrupt_callback().
